event_name: Silicon Valley Bank collapse and regional-bank contagion (March 2023)
description: SVB Financial Group disclosed a large securities loss and capital raise after close on 2023-03-08; a deposit run followed and the FDIC took SVB into receivership on 2023-03-10. Contagion spread to other regional banks; Signature Bank was closed on 2023-03-12.
primary_sources: SEC EDGAR, SVB Financial Group (CIK 0000719739), Form 8-K filed 2023-03-08
provenance_note: Regulatory items (SEC/FDIC/Fed) carry exact primary-source links. News items are curated public-record summaries of widely reported events and cite the publisher; replace with primary article links before any external/customer-facing use.

affected.realized_event: FDIC receivership 2023-03-10; common equity effectively wiped out.
Closed by NY Department of Financial Services 2023-03-12.
Acute deposit flight from 2023-03-13; ultimately failed and was acquired by JPMorgan 2023-05-01.
Sharp share-price drawdown and deposit pressure week of 2023-03-13.
Sharp share-price drawdown and deposit pressure week of 2023-03-13.

controls_should_not_flag.reason: Non-bank holding mentioned only in benign product news; an elevated/high flag here is a false positive.
